title: I Found the Very Best Prime Day Laptop Deals
gist: WIRED laptop editor Luke Larsen covers Prime Day laptop deals across price tiers, with the Microsoft Surface Laptop 7th Edition at $1,039 (31% off) as the top pick, MacBook Air M5 at $949, and HP OmniBook 3 at $542 as best cheap laptop. A key market observation: laptop prices overall are rising in 2026 while MacBook Air has not raised its price, reinforcing Apple's competitive positioning.

insights.claim: Laptop prices broadly rose in 2026, but Apple's MacBook Air M5 held its $1,099 retail price while competitors increased pricing—WIRED's laptop editor describes this as giving the MacBook Air an even stronger value position relative to its competition.
insights.speaker: Luke Larsen
insights.so_what: Apple's decision to hold MacBook Air pricing while competitors raise prices is a deliberate market share strategy; if it continues, Apple may gain meaningful laptop unit share from Windows OEMs facing tariff or component cost pressure.
insights.quote: The prices of laptops in 2026 have been rising. But not the MacBook Air.

insights.claim: MacBook Air M5 (2026) adds support for two external monitors simultaneously—a capability absent in prior MacBook Air models—alongside improved graphics performance from the M5 chip.
insights.speaker: Luke Larsen
insights.so_what: External monitor support for two displays makes the M5 MacBook Air a viable desktop replacement for a wider range of professional users, expanding its addressable market and potential Services attach.
insights.quote: the 2026 model has two important upgrades: highly improved graphics performance thanks to the M5 chip, and also support for up to two external monitors.

insights.claim: Microsoft Surface Laptop 7th Edition (2024) received a 31% Prime Day discount to $1,039, with WIRED noting Microsoft 'no longer technically sells this model'—due to newer Snapdragon X2 chip models replacing it at higher price points.
insights.speaker: Luke Larsen
insights.so_what: Microsoft's product line transition to Snapdragon X2 pushes premium Surface Laptop pricing higher, while the previous generation clears at 31% discount—a common pattern when OEMs transition to new silicon platforms.
insights.quote: Microsoft no longer technically sells this model, which is partially why prices have risen on the base configurations.

insights.claim: HP OmniBook 3 (2026) at $542 (44% off from $970) was named the best cheap laptop, offering 16 GB RAM and 512 GB storage—described as double the memory and storage of the more expensive MacBook Neo at this price point.
insights.speaker: Luke Larsen
insights.so_what: HP competing on raw specs (RAM, storage) against Apple's MacBook Neo at comparable or lower price points shows Windows OEM response to Apple's laptop pricing; the OmniBook 3 may pressure Apple's entry-level segment.
insights.quote: those are incredible specs for laptop at this price. To put things in perspective, that's double the memory and storage you get in the more expensive MacBook Neo.
